'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=0uoAXRpsnc3aiolR9TAavuaHoC4l2f8NyzvB5Sju.4U-1774169674-1.0.1.1-gcqhcV5mo6Xu8J9B7CrN7zPrBCQ_.G4sFhcPbi4QWqw"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
